case_title: EMA BELL VS. COTTON ON USA INC.

docket_entries.description: ORDER APPROVING PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT AND CONSENT JUDGMENT (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS)
PROOF OF SERVICE (TRANSACTION ID # 75305442) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BELL, EMA

PROOF OF SERVICE OF NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT AND CONSENT JUDGMENT; MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES; DECLARATION OF EVAN J. SMITH; AFFIDAVIT; PROPOSED ORDER AND PROPOSED CONSENT JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 75396440) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BELL, EMA

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF EMA BELL'S MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT AND CONSENT JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF EMA BELL'S MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT AND CONSENT JUDGMENT, FILED JANUARY 8. 2025, WHICH IS UNOPPOSED, IS GRANTED. GOOD CAUSE APPEARING, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO APPROVE SETTLEMENT PURSUANT TO HEALTH AND SAFETY CODE SECTION 25249.7(F) AND CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 664.6 IS GRANTED AND JUDGMENT SHALL BE ENTERED CONSISTENT WITH THE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT AND THE [PROPOSED] CONSENT JUDGMENT. ORDER AND CONSENT JUDGMENT ARE SIGNED. JUDGE: JOSEPH M. QUINN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (302/JMQ)

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-19-2025 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Feb-25-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF EMA BELL's Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment.

Plaintiff Ema Bell's Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment, filed January 8. 2025, which is unopposed, is GRANTED. Good cause appearing, Plaintiff's motion to approve settlement pursuant to Health and Safety Code section 25249.7(f) and Code of Civil Procedure section 664.6 is granted and judgment shall be entered consistent with the Proposition 65 Settlement and the [Proposed] Consent Judgment.

Order and consent judgment are signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
